meaning: n.[药]环丝氨酸(一种结核菌抑制药)
examples: Cycloserine is the first such product to be included in the list.
Objective: To investigate the effect of D-cycloserine on spatial working memory in atropine injured rats.
One of the products, Cycloserine, is particularly important because it is a second-line medicine, necessary to treat tuberculosis that is resistant to standard treatment.
D-cycloserine selectively enhances extinction, suppressing the effects of conditioned associations such as anxiety, addiction and phobias.
D-cycloserine, is being tested not to enhance memory, but to abolish it.
